title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (17), PAGE 4, SECTION l-A-a, TITLE (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2198 / 55 OG No. 35, 7305 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2445, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (17), PAGE 4, SECTION l-A-a, TITLE (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (17), page 4, section 1-A-

a

, Title (A) of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(17) Industrial Arts Annex, Iloilo Vocational

High SchoolâLambunao

20,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
